project_management_missing_courses.title: Project Planning and Scheduling
project_management_missing_courses.description: Comprehensive study of project planning techniques and scheduling methodologies including work breakdown structures, critical path method, and resource allocation. Students learn to create detailed project plans and optimize project schedules.
learning_objectives: Develop comprehensive work breakdown structures
Apply critical path method and scheduling techniques
Optimize resource allocation and leveling
Use project management software for planning and scheduling
Manage project dependencies and constraints

project_management_missing_courses.title: Project Cost Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Project budgeting, cost estimation, and financial control techniques for effective project cost management. Students learn to develop project budgets, track expenses, and implement cost control measures throughout the project lifecycle.
learning_objectives: Develop accurate project cost estimates
Create comprehensive project budgets
Implement cost tracking and control systems
Apply earned value management techniques
Analyze cost performance and variances
covered_materials: Change control and cost impact analysis

project_management_missing_courses.title: Quality Management in Projects
project_management_missing_courses.description: Application of quality management principles to project environments including quality planning, assurance, and control. Students learn to implement quality systems and continuous improvement processes in project contexts.
learning_objectives: Develop project quality management plans
Implement quality assurance processes
Apply quality control techniques and tools
Understand quality standards and certifications
Promote continuous improvement in project delivery
covered_materials: Total quality management in project environments

project_management_missing_courses.title: Project Communication Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Effective communication strategies and techniques for project success including stakeholder communication, reporting, and meeting management. Students learn to develop communication plans and facilitate effective project communication.
learning_objectives: Develop comprehensive communication management plans
Implement effective stakeholder communication strategies
Facilitate productive project meetings and workshops
Create clear and meaningful project reports
Manage communication in virtual and distributed teams

project_management_missing_courses.title: Team Leadership and Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Leadership principles and team management techniques specific to project environments. Students learn to build high-performing project teams, motivate team members, and resolve conflicts while achieving project objectives.
learning_objectives: Apply leadership theories to project team management
Build and develop high-performing project teams
Motivate team members and manage performance
Resolve conflicts and manage team dynamics
Lead virtual and cross-functional project teams

project_management_missing_courses.title: Stakeholder Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Systematic approach to identifying, analyzing, and engaging project stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle. Students learn to manage stakeholder expectations, build relationships, and ensure stakeholder satisfaction.
learning_objectives: Identify and analyze project stakeholders systematically
Develop stakeholder engagement strategies
Manage stakeholder expectations and requirements
Build and maintain positive stakeholder relationships
Handle stakeholder conflicts and resistance

project_management_missing_courses.title: Project Procurement Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Procurement processes and contract management for projects including vendor selection, contract negotiation, and supplier relationship management. Students learn to manage external resources and vendor relationships effectively.
learning_objectives: Develop procurement strategies and plans
Conduct vendor selection and evaluation processes
Negotiate contracts and manage contract performance
Understand legal and risk aspects of procurement
Manage supplier relationships and performance
covered_materials: Vendor selection criteria and evaluation methods
Legal aspects of procurement and contracts

project_management_missing_courses.title: Strategic Project Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Alignment of project management with organizational strategy including portfolio management, strategic planning, and value realization. Students learn to connect projects to business objectives and measure strategic value.
learning_objectives: Align projects with organizational strategy and objectives
Understand portfolio management and project prioritization
Measure and realize strategic value from projects
Apply strategic thinking to project selection and execution
Manage projects in dynamic and uncertain environments
covered_materials: Strategic alignment and business case development
Innovation and new product development projects

project_management_missing_courses.title: Program and Portfolio Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Management of multiple related projects and organizational project portfolios including coordination, resource optimization, and strategic alignment. Students learn to manage complex program and portfolio environments.
learning_objectives: Understand program management principles and practices
Apply portfolio management techniques and governance
Coordinate multiple projects and manage dependencies
Optimize resource allocation across portfolios
Implement portfolio governance and decision-making processes

project_management_missing_courses.title: International Project Management
project_management_missing_courses.description: Management of projects in international and multicultural environments including cultural considerations, global teams, and international business practices. Students learn to navigate challenges of global project delivery.
learning_objectives: Understand cultural dimensions in international projects
Manage global and virtual project teams effectively
Navigate international business and legal environments
Adapt project management practices to different cultures
Handle time zone and communication challenges
covered_materials: Legal and regulatory considerations across countries
Time zone management and virtual collaboration
Global project delivery models and frameworks
